title: Pleasure
content:
A dinner, coffee and cigars,
        Of friends, a half a score.
     Each favorite vintage in its turn, -
        What man could wish for more?
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Pleasure", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
